summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Turbo Showdown drag racing game. Backend APIs fully functional (27/27 tests passed). Frontend UI testing successful with all major features working including player creation, dealership, garage, upgrade shop, tournaments, and racing mechanics. Canvas-based race engine with RPM/shifting mechanics operational.

design_issues.issue: Tournament cards intermittently not detected by test selectors, though navigation works correctly

passed_tests: All 17 cars displayed in dealership with correct categories
Category filtering (all, compact, jdm, muscle, truck, suv, euro, exotic, electric)
Car purchase system with cash updates (Honda Civic Si for $5,000)
Upgrade purchase with cash deduction (eBay Cold Air Intake $200)
Quick Race navigation and pre-race screen
Canvas-based race screen with RPM gauge, Christmas tree lights, and racing mechanics
Navigation bar consistency showing username and cash throughout
All API endpoints functioning (player, cars, parts, tournaments, upgrades, races)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major features working, minor tournament card detection issue)
